get.summary: Get Clients in Do Not Track
get.description: Get a list of all Do Not Track clients. All clients marked as "Do Not Track" will be returned.

parameters.name: onlyGlobalTrackingExclusions
parameters.description: Optional filter to include only entries with Global Tracking Exclusions.

400.description: Bad response. Failed StatusResponse with an error message indicating the reason of the failure, and success equal to false.

200.description: Returns a list of clients.

post.summary: Add clients to Do Not Track
post.description: Add a list of Clients to the Do Not Track list.

requestBody.description:
**`payload`**: The request object to add to the Do Not Track list.  
**`payload.deleteclients`**: A flag to delete history from clients. Defaults to true.  
**`payload.SendChangeNotification`**: A flag to indicate whether a change notification pubSub should be sent. Defaults to true.

400.description: Bad response. Failed StatusResponse with an error message indicating the reason of the failure, and success equal to false.

200.description: Returns a Do Not Track Addition Object.

delete.summary: Remove clients from Do Not Track
delete.description: Removes a list of clients from the Do Not Track list.

requestBody.description:
**`payload`**: The request object to remove from the Do Not Track list.  
**`payload.SendChangeNotification`**: A flag to indicate whether a change notification pubSub should be sent. Defaults to true.

400.description: Bad response. Failed StatusResponse with an error message indicating the reason of the failure, and success equal to false.

200.description: Returns a Do Not Track Removal Object.

All fields must be provided.

200.description: Returns the list of updated DNTEntry objects with dntid

patch.summary: Marks the respective Do Not Track User entries as Global Users.
patch.description:
Used as part of the migration to Do Not Track Management through Identity.
Accounts may have existing entries that meet the previous definition of a Global User (i.e. username with no logon domain), but are not marked as such with the added globaluser property.

400.description: Bad Request

put.summary: Bulk update clients.  Initially will just update license overage for pending clients
put.description:
Accepts or rejects a list of clients that are pending due to license overage.
Only clients with a pending delete date of '9999-12-31 23:59:59' are eligible.
Accepted clients have their delete_date set to NULL (kept active).
Rejected clients have their delete_date set to UTC_TIMESTAMP() (soft deleted).

requestBody.description: List of client IDs and license approval state

400.description: Bad request. Failed StatusResponse with an error message indicating the reason of the failure, and success equal to false.

200.description: A response with the list of successfully updated client IDs and any that failed.

200.description: Returns separate lists of successful and failed unmerged clients for the list of clients.

put.description:
Updates the consumer password with the consumer Id. The new password must have at least 8 characters, 1 uppercase character, 1 lowercase character, 1 special character and 1 number.
            The allowed special characters are the following: !#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@[]\\^_`{|}~

200.description: Group summaries for all groups in the account.

get.description:
Returns a list of Groups defined for the account.Supports Search capabilities.
If a numeric search criteria is used it will search for matching group ids, group name. The matching is a StartsWith operator.
If an alpha-numeric is used then a match will be searched on group names.

400.description: Failed StatusResponse with an error message indicating the reason of the failure, and success equal to false.

200.description: Either the full list if no search criteria is added or a filtered list based on the search criteria.

400.description: Bad Request

get.description: Returns a list of Groups (with not membership information) defined for the account.

400.description: Failed StatusResponse with an error message indicating the reason of the failure, and success equal to false.

200.description: The full list of groups for an account.

get.description: Exports a csv of the group member assignments for the account. The name of the file includes the account Id.

400.description: Failed StatusResponse with an error message indicating the reason of the failure, and success equal to false.

200.description: Returns the list of group member assignments for the account.

post.description:
Imports a csv for new user/group assignments for the account.
The return metrics are as follows
NewGroupNoAssignments - This identifies the groups in the request that have no user assignment.
NewGroupAssignments - This identifies the groups in the request that have user assignments.
DuplicateGroupsInFile - For Groups only (no user assignment to the group at all) counts the duplicates in the file.
DuplicateGroupsInDB - For Groups only (no user assignment to the group at all) counts the duplicates in the file compared to already existing groups.
DuplicateAssignmentsInFile - For Groups with an assignment counts the duplicates in the file of that exact assignment.
DuplicateAssignmentsInDB - For Groups with an assignment counts the duplicates in the file compared to already existing assignments of that group/user.
SuccessfulAssignments - The count of all successful assignments made.
AssignmentErrors - The count of assignments attempted but not completed due to an error condition.
SkippedUserIDs - Counts any user ids that could not be assigned.
NewGroupsTotal - Count of new groups created.

400.description: Failed StatusResponse with an error message indicating the reason of the failure, and success equal to false.

200.description: Returns Summary Metrics (counts) for the assignment requests.

get.description: Test end point up status. The service timing is the full time where database time is a subset.

alias.description: New alias name. Must not be empty. Max 254 characters.

password.description: New password must have at least 8 characters, 1 uppercase character, 1 lowercase character, 1 special character and 1 number.

role.description: New role. Must not be empty.
